creator: kp@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Benedict Reuschling from comment #2)
Good question, but I don't really have a strong opinion.

ipfw has a default configuration in /etc/rc.firewall, but ipf doesn't.

We could certainly use /usr/share/examples/pf/pf.conf as the 'default' pf.conf, as it's all commented out and it already refers to the man pages and the examples in /usr/share/examples/pf.

It's probably better to update the documentation though, and do the same for pf as for ipf: no default config, but point at the examples from the documentation.
